events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the joint was brazed without a nitrogen purge (confirmed by black oxide scale in the cutaway photos), which violates the required purge-before/during-braze sequence. Since the joint is already contaminated, evacuation alone can't fix it — the decision is `fail` (high risk) with the corrective sequence: cut out the affected joint, re-braze under active nitrogen purge, replace the filter drier, pressure test, then deep-vacuum evacuate before charging.
